cwes.name: Improper Input Validation
cwes.requirement: All external input MUST be validated against expected format and range

cwes.name: OS Command Injection
cwes.requirement: OS commands MUST NOT be constructed from user-controlled data

cwes.name: SQL Injection
cwes.requirement: SQL queries MUST use parameterised statements

cwes.name: Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code
cwes.requirement: Dynamic code evaluation MUST NOT process user-controlled input

cwes.name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
cwes.requirement: Credentials MUST be loaded from secure external sources, never hardcoded

cwes.name: Missing Authentication for Critical Function
cwes.requirement: All state-changing endpoints MUST require authentication

cwes.name: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory
cwes.requirement: File paths MUST be canonicalised and validated against allowed directories

cwes.name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
cwes.requirement: Output rendered in HTML MUST be escaped or use auto-escaping templates

cwes.name: Use of Hard-coded Password
cwes.requirement: Passwords MUST NOT appear as literals in source code

cwes.name: Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data
cwes.requirement: Sensitive data at rest MUST be encrypted using platform-appropriate mechanisms

cwes.name: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
cwes.requirement: Only current cryptographic standards (AES-256, SHA-256+) MUST be used

cwes.name: Origin Validation Error
cwes.requirement: Cross-origin requests MUST be validated against an allowlist

cwes.name: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
cwes.requirement: Untrusted data MUST NOT be deserialized using unsafe parsers

cwes.name: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
cwes.requirement: Logs MUST NOT contain passwords, tokens, or PII

cwes.name: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
cwes.requirement: XML parsers MUST disable external entity resolution

cwes.name: Insufficient Session Expiration
cwes.requirement: Sessions MUST expire after a configurable idle timeout

cwes.name: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
cwes.requirement: Files and resources MUST use least-privilege permissions

cwes.name: Incorrect Authorization
cwes.requirement: Authorization MUST be enforced server-side for every protected operation

cwes.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
cwes.requirement: Server-side HTTP requests MUST validate target URLs against an allowlist

cwes.name: Use of Unmaintained Third Party Components
cwes.requirement: Dependencies MUST be kept up-to-date and free of known vulnerabilities
